_meta.structure: Choose two 20-card packets, shuffle into one 40-card deck. Play until 2 wins or 3 losses (Arena). Physical: open two 20-card Jumpstart boosters and shuffle together.
_meta.contentsNote: Theme names, colours and rarities are Wizards-confirmed. Per-packet CARD COUNTS and card lists are MTGA Jump Into Marvel packet data (from MTGABuddy) — treated as 'arena-packet' data at MEDIUM confidence. They are NOT verified card-for-card against physical mini packs, and some Arena slots are random. 26 of 51 packets have imported counts; the rest are theme-only. Pair rankings remain ESTIMATED until real table results are entered.
_meta.sourceWarning: Packet contents are based on MTGA Jump Into Marvel data unless physical mini packs are checked card-for-card.

buzz.note: Reed Richards (quadruples card draw) is a highlighted value engine; highest-value mythic packet.

packets.notes: Arena packet counts imported (8 lands + 12 spells across 5 colours = fixing-heavy).
